title: Tag Claude in, right where you already work
summary: Anthropic released Claude Tag, a Slack integration that allows teams to invoke Claude as an AI assistant directly in Slack channels and threads. The tool maintains channel context and organizational tool connections while persisting work across multiple days, available in beta for Team and Enterprise plans.
writeup: The video introduces Claude Tag, an Anthropic Slack integration that lets teams call Claude directly in channels and threads. It matters because it embeds the assistant inside an existing workflow rather than a separate app, drawing on channel context and organizational tool connections. Key takeaways: the tool persists work across multiple days, supports multi-turn conversation with context management, and is available in beta on Team and Enterprise plans.
